title: pelargonium × decorum
intro: Pelargonium × decorum, also known as the Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species in the Geraniaceae family, resulting from the cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium fasciculatum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pelargonium × decorum include its ability to alleviate stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and support immune function, among others. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium × decorum include teas, essential oils, and extracts, which can be used to create perfumes, skincare products, and other applications.
